name: engineer-quality
description: Read-only full-history Engineer analytics for ROMET quality data through Supabase RLS.

tools.name: get_quality_summary
tools.description: Read KPI summary for ROMET / Planta Principal. With no dates, returns full historical KPIs.

tools.name: get_quality_ranking
tools.description: Read bounded quality rankings for ROMET / Planta Principal.

tools.name: get_quality_trend
tools.description: Read quality trends for ROMET / Planta Principal, using full history by default and reporting aggregation/truncation.

tools.name: search_quality_catalog
tools.description: Search scoped customers, products, operations and failure modes. ROMET is the tenant, not a catalog value.

tools.name: search_controls
tools.description: Search paginated control history. Defaults to the last 14 days and is not a full historical summary.

tools.name: analyze_quality
tools.description: Run controlled multidimensional analytics for ROMET without SQL, with up to two groupBy dimensions and 100 rows.

tools.name: compare_quality_periods
tools.description: Compare two explicit periods for ROMET using controlled measures and optional one-dimensional grouping.

tools.name: get_quality_pareto
tools.description: Compute server-side defects Pareto with share, cumulativeShare and threshold cutoff.

SUPABASE_URL.title: Supabase URL
SUPABASE_URL.description: Project URL for the Supabase instance.

SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY.title: Supabase publishable key
SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY.description: Publishable or anon Supabase key. Service role and secret keys are rejected.

ENGINEER_SUPABASE_EMAIL.title: Engineer email
ENGINEER_SUPABASE_EMAIL.description: Supabase Auth email for the Engineer user.

ENGINEER_SUPABASE_PASSWORD.title: Engineer password
ENGINEER_SUPABASE_PASSWORD.description: Supabase Auth password for the Engineer user.
